mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM `im_group_member` t WHERE t.`quit` = 0 AND t.user_id = #{recvId} AND t.`group_id` IN ( SELECT t1.`group_id` FROM `im_group_member` t1 INNER JOIN `im_group` t2 ON t1.`group_id` = t2.`id` AND t2.`is_allow_add_other` = 0 WHERE t1.`user_id` = #{sendId} AND t1.`quit` = 0 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT gm1.group_id,g.name AS groupName,g.head_image_thumb FROM im_group_member gm1 INNER JOIN im_group_member gm2 ON gm1.group_id = gm2.group_id AND gm2.quit = 0 AND gm2.user_id = #{friendId} INNER JOIN im_group g ON g.id = gm1.group_id AND g.dissolve = 0 WHERE gm1.user_id = #{userId} AND gm1.quit = 0
